name: Fricasseed Raccoon
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean the raccoon and remove all visible fat.
2. Cut the raccoon into 8 to 10 pieces.
3. Rub each piece with salt and pepper, then roll in flour.
4. Cook the pieces in hot fat until browned on all sides.
5. Add broth to the pan, cover, and simmer for 2 hours or until tender.
6. Serve 8 servings.
